Name: LuigiNPC
Notes: A non-playable variant of Luigi that can be talked to. In the case of LuigiEvent, it appears by default unless Obj_arg0 is set. If the object is LuigiNPC, Obj_arg0 will always yield Normal animation behavior, except for when it is set to 0, in which case, Luigi will be scared and can spawn a Power Star.

Obj_arg0.Name: Behavior
Obj_arg0.Description: The animation/behavior to be used. The animation will always be "Normal" for LuigiNPC. Some behaviors have quirks that change based on certain conditions, such as 2 on LuigiEvent having an upward launch behavior when SW_APPEAR / SW_SLEEP is used, turning into Normal behavior upon landing.

Values.Notes: Normal (Always appeared, cannot spawn Power Star)
Stuck to a wall, then Normal

SW_APPEAR.Description: Appears when this switch is activated.

SW_AWAKE.Description: Enables rendering and resumes updates when this switch is active.
